allow: PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('https://github.com/basia-dem/basia-dem.github.io', 'https://basia-dem.github.io/'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "$\($r.StatusCode\) $u" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { "$\($resp.StatusCode.value__\) $u" } else { "ERR $u  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })
